svg.title: tawc color mockup
svg.desc:
Side-by-side light/dark mockup of the tawc Android app for iterating on colors in Inkscape. Every named color is a solid Inkscape swatch defined in <defs>. Open the Swatches panel (Object > Swatches, or Shift+Ctrl+W) or simply double-click a tile in the "Palette" row at the bottom — every fill on canvas that references that swatch updates.
Swatch IDs map directly to Android color resources: tawc_FOO_light -> app/src/main/res/values/colors.xml @tawc_FOO tawc_FOO_dark -> app/src/main/res/values-night/colors.xml @tawc_FOO tawc_FOO -> shared (no values-night override in colors.xml)
The text-on-card / text-on-window text in the real app uses Material3's default colorOnSurface, which currently matches tawc_on_tonal, so the mockup reuses that swatch for all body text. If you want to break that coupling, add a dedicated color resource and update the swatch IDs here to match.
svg.text: Choose a command to launch in the rootfs.
Choose a command to launch in the rootfs.
Palette — click a tile to pick that swatch, then edit its colour
